description: Buyer asks to tour one selected property after receiving details.
subject: Re: Property
body: Want to take a look at 9605 Corbe Dr tomorrow afternoon

description: Buyer refers to the second property in a prior result set.
subject: Re: Property options
body: Can you send more details on the second property, 9605 Corbe Dr?

description: Buyer asks payment/financing question that should answer cautiously.
subject: Mortgage question
body: For 100 E 51st St #7, what would the monthly payment be with 20% down?

description: Fair-housing sensitive question must not auto-send.
subject: Neighborhood question
body: Is this a safe family neighborhood with good schools and low crime?

description: Seller asks for valuation and timeline.
subject: Selling my home
body: I may sell my house at 4309 Fairway Path this summer. What could it be worth?

description: B2B sales outreach should be ignored by Iris.
subject: HandtextAI API - Lumenosis AI inquiry
body: Quick question, do you want to integrate our SaaS API for automated SMS?

subject: Stop
body: Please remove me from emails and stop contacting me.

description: Pronoun-only follow-up should stay concise and ask for clarification if property is unclear.
subject: Re: Listings
body: Can I see that one after work?
